findings.title: PROP-072 implementation verified post-deploy; first observability window opens at next workspace-sync cycle (~18:09Z)
findings.summary: PROP-072 (Step 4c hoist + self-attestation + Step 0 startup-check) was applied 22 minutes ago. All three layered fixes are present in workspace-sync.md verbatim; the grep verification pattern returns FIXED. The first post-deploy workspace-sync cycle has not yet run -- at runtime 17:22Z the most recent workspace-sync cycle was 16:09Z (pre-deploy) and the most recent PROP-066 step4c sentinel is from 09:07Z. Next tinker run should verify that the 18:09Z cycle (and every subsequent cycle) emits a sync-workspace-runs sentinel.

findings.recommendation: Tinker auto-verify on next run. If sync-workspace-runs sentinel for 18:09Z cycle is missing -> PROP-072 PRIMARY fix has ALSO failed (extremely unlikely given 4c is now first-action, but the secondary self-attestation backstop should catch it). If sentinel is present -> PROP-072 succeeded and the FND-01 from 17:00 run is closed.

findings.title: wins.json FUSE-staleness observed for ~35s, self-resolved before this run completed
findings.summary: Initial md5 sweep at 17:22:04Z reported data/wins.json FUSE hash 5bee7aced... vs GH 913bfeefa... (mismatch). Re-check at 17:22:39Z (after fresh clone + git ops accessed FUSE) reported FUSE 913bfeefa... = GH. The 17:01:52Z decider commit afe4cfc updating wins.json had been pushed but FUSE had not been refreshed via Step 4c (which has not run since 09:07:58Z per sync-workspace-runs sentinel ledger). The materialization on second access is consistent with FUSE/iCloud lazy-load behavior. Not a new defect -- same PROP-066 silent-skip pattern that motivated PROP-072. PROP-072 should eliminate the staleness window starting at the 18:09Z cycle.
evidence_files: git log afe4cfc data/wins.json (decider commit at 17:01:52Z)
